eval_set.name: Intel 10-K FY2024 RAGAS Evaluation Set
eval_set.source_document: Intel Corporation Form 10-K, Filed January 31, 2025 (Fiscal Year Ended December 28, 2024)

questions.question: What was Intel's total revenue in FY 2024?
How much did Intel's revenue decline compared to FY 2023?
What was Intel's net income in FY 2024?
What was Intel's diluted EPS in FY 2024?
How much did Intel spend on R&D in FY 2024?
What was Intel's gross margin percentage in FY 2024?
What was Intel's total debt at year-end 2024?
How much did Intel invest in capital expenditures in FY 2024?
What was Intel's effective tax rate in FY 2024?
How much revenue did the Client Computing Group (CCG) generate in FY 2024?
How much revenue did the Data Center and AI Group (DCAI) generate in FY 2024?
How much revenue did the Network and Edge Group (NEX) generate in FY 2024?
How much revenue did Intel Foundry Services (IFS) generate in FY 2024?
What was Intel's total workforce at year-end 2024?
How much did Intel return to shareholders via dividends in 2024?
What was Intel's inventory balance at year-end 2024?
How much did Intel report in operating cash flow for FY 2024?
What fiscal year does Intel's 10-K cover?
Where is Intel's headquarters located?
questions.ground_truth: 2200 Mission College Blvd, Santa Clara, California 95054-1549.

questions.question: What is Intel's stock ticker symbol and on which exchange does it trade?
questions.ground_truth: INTC on the Nasdaq Global Select Market.

questions.question: How many shares of Intel were outstanding as of January 24, 2025?
What was Intel's market value of equity held by non-affiliates as of June 28, 2024?
What are Intel's main customer categories?
questions.ground_truth: OEMs, ODMs, cloud service providers, and industrial and communication equipment manufacturers.

questions.question: What are the five superpowers driving Intel's strategy?
questions.ground_truth: Ubiquitous compute, pervasive connectivity, cloud-to-edge infrastructure, AI, and sensing.

questions.question: What are Intel's four key strategic themes?
questions.ground_truth: Product competitiveness, open platforms, manufacturing at scale, and people.

questions.question: What process nodes were in high-volume manufacturing at Intel in 2024?
What two breakthrough technologies are part of Intel 18A?
questions.ground_truth: RibbonFET (gate-all-around transistors) and PowerVia (backside power delivery).

questions.question: What new client processor family will debut on Intel 18A?
What major AI accelerator did Intel launch in 2024?
What was Intel's workforce size at the end of 2024?
What was Intel's undesired employee turnover rate in 2024?
What percentage of Intel's global employees were women in 2024?
What percentage of Intel's senior leadership positions were held by women in 2024?
What CHIPS Act funding did Intel secure in 2024?
questions.ground_truth: Up to $7.9 billion under the commercial program and up to $3 billion under the Secure Enclave program.

questions.question: When was Intel's most recent stock repurchase?
questions.ground_truth: Q1 2021; repurchases have been suspended since then.

questions.question: When did Intel suspend its quarterly dividends?
questions.ground_truth: Starting Q4 2024, with dividend restrictions in place for 5 years under the CHIPS Act agreement.

questions.question: What environmental target was tied to employee bonuses in 2024?
questions.ground_truth: Reduce Scope 1 and Scope 2 greenhouse gas emissions by 25,000 metric tons of CO₂ equivalent compared to 2023.
